headline: Ecolab Schedules Webcast of Industry Conference for June 2, 2026

headline: UBS Upgrades Ecolab to Buy, Raises Price Target to $325

headline: Best Dividend Aristocrats: May 2026
summary: The Dividend Aristocrats underperformed SPY YTD, returning 3.34% versus SPY's 10.39%, though 22 Aristocrats still posted double-digit gains.
